title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Ladder family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
